/usr/bin/ar qc libugv_teleop_core.a CMakeFiles/ugv_teleop_core.dir/ugv_teleop_core_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ugv_teleop_core.dir/src/keyboard_teleop_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ugv_teleop_core.dir/src/keyboard_teleop_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ugv_teleop_core.dir/src/joy_axis_selector_logic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ugv_teleop_core.dir/src/joy_launcher_logic.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libugv_teleop_core.a
